final:
// // This module decrements its count on each negative edge of the clock when the disable signal is low. If the reset signal is activated, the count output is set to zero.
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input enable,
  output reg [3:0] count_out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
      count_out <= 4'b0000;
    end
    else if (enable) begin
      count_out <= count_out + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module decrements its count on each negative edge of the clock when the disable signal is low. If the reset signal is activated, the count output is set to zero.
